title: Raffles: The Amateur Cracksman
writer: E.W. Hornung, Eugene Wiley Presbrey, Harvey F. Thew
actors: House Peters, Miss DuPont, Hedda Hopper
plot: A.J. Raffles and his friend Bunny travel aboard a luxury liner where a necklace is stolen. The Amateur Cracksman is believed to have done it. This unusual jewel thief returns the pieces afterwards, asking that reward money be sent...
